verdicts.reason: Re-adjudicated at HEAD e1fde0b. All required families exist and pass under my own execution at this HEAD (node --test: unit 11/11 incl. new JADJ-S-011 malformed-artifact regression, e2e 11/11): 3-family collection + pr prepare prerequisite error, record validation + HEAD binding, all five gate states, required+critical linkage, opt-out + backward compat. Assertions target behavior (statuses, reasons, file absence, HEAD sha, error-message discrimination), not token presence.

Re-adjudicated at HEAD e1fde0b. JADJ-S-010 and JDA-E2E-010 run real preparePullRequest with judgment_adjudication.enabled:false on an artifact-free repo: gate node absent, no crash. Delta note: readJudgmentAdjudicationIfExists still returns null for a missing artifact (no crash); only a corrupt existing artifact now fails loud, which is intentional fail-loud behavior, not a crash on artifact-free repos. Verified passing at this HEAD.

Re-adjudicated at HEAD e1fde0b (criticality/required wiring unchanged: src/pr-manager.js isCriticalUnresolvedGate and required-gate whitelist). JADJ-S-009 and JDA-E2E-009 run real preparePullRequest on an agent_workflow repo and assert gate.required===true, ready_for_pr_create===false, gate present in execution_gate.blocking_gates — the set the pre-create check refuses to waive by reason alone. Verified passing at this HEAD.

Re-adjudicated at HEAD e1fde0b (unchanged by delta). JADJ-S-008 and JDA-E2E-008 assert all-judged_sound-at-current-head => passed, and zero items => not_applicable with explicit /not a pass/ reason. Verified passing at this HEAD.

Re-adjudicated at HEAD e1fde0b (decision-closure logic unchanged). JADJ-S-007 and JDA-E2E-007 assert needs_human_judgment resolves only via accepted decision with reason+artifact at source gate:judgment_dag_adjudication:<item-id>; open/reason-less/artifact-less negatives all stay unresolved. Verified passing at this HEAD.

Re-adjudicated at HEAD e1fde0b (buildJudgmentDagAdjudicationGate unchanged). JADJ-S-006 and JDA-E2E-006 assert judged_unsound yields status failed with the verbatim judge reason in gate.reason. Verified passing at this HEAD.

Re-adjudicated at HEAD e1fde0b (gate evaluation unchanged; delta additionally makes corrupt judgment-adjudication.json fail loud instead of silent-null needs_evidence masquerade, per JADJ-S-011). JADJ-S-005 and JDA-E2E-005 assert needs_evidence for absent/stale/null-head verdicts fail-closed, with every missing item id in gate.reason. Verified at this HEAD: unit 11/11, e2e 11/11.

Re-adjudicated at HEAD e1fde0b (recordJudgmentAdjudication unchanged by delta). JADJ-S-004 and JDA-E2E-004 (real CLI) reject non-3-value verdict, blank reason, missing provenance; stored head_commit equals git rev-parse HEAD; non-git repo refused with explicit HEAD-resolution error. Verified passing at this HEAD.

Re-adjudicated at HEAD e1fde0b (delta does not touch request-body text). JDA-E2E-003 asserts fresh-context independence, refutation stance, all three verdict tokens, and the token-match prohibition line; definitions rendered from JUDGMENT_VERDICT_DEFINITIONS in the same block (src/adjudication.js). Reran suites at this HEAD: all pass.

Re-adjudicated at HEAD e1fde0b. Missing pr-prepare.json still rejects with /no pr prepare artifact/ and JDA-E2E-002 asserts no request file is written (ENOENT). The delta strengthens this path: corrupt (present-but-malformed) pr-prepare.json is now a distinct explicit parse-failure error, not misreported as missing (JADJ-S-011 asserts doesNotMatch /no pr prepare artifact was found/). Verified 11/11 unit + 11/11 e2e at this HEAD.

Re-adjudicated at HEAD e1fde0b (delta touches only artifact parse-failure paths, item collection/request generation unchanged). JADJ-S-001/S-002 and JDA-E2E-001 assert the request contains all three item families, verbatim decision_question, mechanical status, matched evidence, and changed files from a real pr-prepare.json. Reran both suites at this HEAD: unit 11/11, e2e 11/11 pass.
